Our Craft Promise

We blend henna the same day it ships, so your stain is bold and consistent. Every batch is tested for stain depth, aroma, and glide.

Freshness Guaranteed

Small-batch blending means peak stain power on arrival.

Safe & Skin-Friendly

No metallic salts, no artificial dyes, no shortcuts.

FAQ

Transparent details to help you order with confidence.

How long does the stain last?

7�12 days depending on skin prep, aftercare, and exposure to water.

How do I store the cone?

Keep it refrigerated for up to 7 days or freeze for 3 months.

Do you ship nationally?

Yes � shipping is available nationwide with tracking.

Can I order in bulk?

Yes. Bulk orders receive priority blending and discounted pricing.

Ready for a richer stain?

We�ll help you choose the right set for your event.
